items.label: Johto-only challenge: team ≤ Lv 9
items.note: For 'Clipping the Pigeon's Wings' — defeat Falkner in Set battle style, using only Johto Pokémon that never exceed Lv 9 in battle, and without using any Pack items.

items.label: Recommended counter
items.note: Dunsparce from Dark Cave just before Violet City — Normal type, and its move Rage hits harder each time it is struck, letting it shred the gym.
